name: AESTIQ AI – AI-powered vacuum microneedling RF
shortDescription: Vacuum microneedling RF device with built-in AI Educator system and ANG™ technology. Anti-aging No.1 – it teaches, guides and optimizes.
description: AESTIQ AI is not just a microneedling RF device – it is an aesthetic platform powered by built-in artificial intelligence that not only treats but also teaches, guides and optimizes. It is like having an RF specialist with 100% knowledge of the device standing next to you at all times.
metaTitle: AESTIQ AI microneedling RF | AI Educator + ANG™ technology
metaDescription: AESTIQ AI – Vacuum microneedling RF device with built-in AI training system and ANG™ Advanced Needle Guidance technology.

videoDescription.headline: AESTIQ AI – Intelligent skin renewal and education system in one
paragraphs: Unlike most devices, here you don't have to guess. AESTIQ AI thinks for the operator, so even as a beginner you can work confidently, and as an advanced practitioner you can work even more precisely.
Not just a machine – an intelligent system. It doesn't just treat – it teaches. It doesn't just give options – it helps you decide. That's why you progress faster, make fewer mistakes and earn more.

afterVideo.text: Do you have questions about AESTIQ AI? We are happy to help!

final.headline: Interested in AESTIQ AI microneedling RF?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we will help you decide whether this is the best choice for you.

featureRows.headline: Why choose AESTIQ AI?
featureRows.subtitle: The No.1 version of anti-aging treatments – artificial intelligence, ANG™ technology, vacuum microneedling RF.

features.title: AI Educator – built-in training course inside the device
features.description:
One of the biggest advantages of AESTIQ AI is the fully integrated AI training system.

What it can do:

Step-by-step usage guidance
Recommendations by skin type and concern
Selection of appropriate parameters
Continuous support during the treatment
features.highlight: It is like having an expert standing next to you at all times.

features.title: ANG™ – Advanced Needle Guidance
features.description: The exclusive ANG™ technology offers preset, professionally recommended parameters for every treatment area. It takes into account the specifics of the treatment area, supports standardized and consistent work, and minimizes the risk of error. The built-in animations also provide visual guidance, making execution more accurate and confident.
features.highlight: Precision on a new level – not guesswork, but professional recommendation.

features.title: Vacuum microneedling RF – the No.1 version of anti-aging
features.description: The advanced vacuum system stabilizes and lifts the skin – important: it does not stretch it, but fixes it in place. As a result, more accurate needle penetration, more even energy distribution and greater treatment comfort are achieved. RF energy works in the deeper layers of the skin, supporting a firmer, smoother and more even complexion.
features.highlight: Stabilization + RF deep impact = visible anti-aging results.

features.title: Versatile applications – for every skin concern
features.description:
AESTIQ AI enables the widest range of microneedling RF treatments.
Anti-aging treatments
Wrinkles and fine lines
Acne scar treatment
Stretch mark improvement
Skin renewal, texture refinement

features.title: Fast return on investment
features.description: The market price of one microneedling RF treatment is 60.000–100.000 Ft per treatment. Based on the device price of 1.699.990 Ft, only 17 treatments (calculated at 100.000 Ft) or 28 treatments (at 60.000 Ft) are needed to break even. Depending on traffic, it can pay back in as little as 1-2 months, after which every treatment is pure profit.

training.headline: Comprehensive training and business support
training.intro: The price of AESTIQ AI includes a comprehensive, professionally approved training package. The training does not only provide technical knowledge, but also a business mindset.
items: Detailed course material and treatment protocols
Business module – pricing, marketing, client management
closingParagraphs: Live model practical training is also available – you can master the treatments on real clients under professional supervision.
And the built-in AI Educator is constantly there next to you in the device after every purchase.
training.freeText: Basic training is FREE with the purchase of the device!
training.duration: One-day intensive training + continuous AI support

expertQuote.quote: AESTIQ AI is the first microneedling RF device where the operator does not need to know everything – the machine itself teaches. This is a revolutionary approach: the chance of error decreases, the learning curve speeds up, and the client's results become much more predictable. This is the direction of the future.
expertQuote.author: Gaszler Simonetta

functionCards.name: 5 applications
functionCards.description: Anti-aging, wrinkles, scars, stretch marks, texture.

faq.question: What does AI Educator mean?
faq.answer: It is a built-in, AI-powered training system that runs inside the device. It teaches you how to use the device step by step, gives recommendations for specific skin types and concerns, helps with the selection of the appropriate parameters, and provides continuous support during treatments. It is like having a specialist standing next to you at all times.

faq.question: What is ANG™ technology?
faq.answer: Advanced Needle Guidance (ANG™) is an exclusive technology that offers preset, professionally recommended parameters for every treatment area. It takes into account the specifics of the treatment area, supports standardized work, and minimizes the risk of error. The built-in animations also provide visual support.

faq.question: Why is vacuum microneedling RF worth it?
faq.answer: The vacuum system stabilizes and lifts the skin – it does not stretch it –, so the needles penetrate more accurately, energy is distributed more evenly, and the treatment is more comfortable. This means greater treatment safety and more visible results.

faq.question: What treatments is it suitable for?
faq.answer: Anti-aging, reduction of wrinkles and fine lines, treatment of acne scars, improvement of stretch marks, general skin renewal and texture refinement. It is the No.1 anti-aging treatment – which is why AESTIQ AI is the perfect partner for specialists in this field.

faq.question: How long does it take to pay back?
faq.answer: The market price of one microneedling RF treatment is 60.000-100.000 Ft. Starting from the device price of 1.699.990 Ft, it pays back between 17-28 treatments, which depending on traffic can be 1-2 months. After that every treatment is pure profit.

faq.question: What are the payment terms?
faq.answer: 50% deposit when the order is placed, 50% remaining amount when the device is received. Upon request, individual interest-free installment payment is also available – please contact us. Delivery time: 2-6 weeks.

whatsIncluded: AESTIQ AI microneedling RF device (with vacuum system)
Detailed course material, treatment protocols, client documentation
